cards.back: A systematic process used to evaluate the economic advantages and disadvantages of a project or decision
The process of identifying, assessing, and mitigating potential risks that may impact a project or organization
A technique used to analyze how changes in input values affect the output of a cost-benefit analysis
The time it takes for a project to recover its initial investment through savings or revenue
A measure of the present value of future cash flows, used to evaluate the economic viability of a project
